_help: Site overrides for Ansys Elastic Licence Monitor. Detection works without any of these set. The perpetual-context enrichment in toast 1 (the 'Perpetual X is held by [user]' variant) requires licenseServer.host/port and perpetualFeatures. The compliance check (expectedConfig) verifies the workstation's licence config against the site standard and offers an admin-elevated bat to repair drift; absent or empty -> check disabled. See README.md 'Configuration' for the full key reference.
